title: Layerz Builder Cohort #1 Demo Day
description: Watch the top builder teams showcase their MVPs built during the intensive 6-week Layerz Builder cohort. Meet developers, designers, and web3 investors.

title: AI & Web3 Innovation Hackathon
description: A 48-hour builders event exploring the intersection of decentralized infrastructure and artificial intelligence agents. Over $10k in builder grants.

title: Introduction to Smart Contract Auditing
description: Learn the basics of Solidity security, common vulnerability vectors (reentrancy, overflow), and static analysis tools like Slither.

title: Web3 Design & UX Playbook Launch
description: Unveiling the new UX standards for multi-chain dApps and smart account recovery flows. Panel discussion with web3 designers.
